project_context.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Prioritizes clarity, data hierarchy, and functional density.

design_rationale: Notch/Safe-Area Avoidance: Wrapped the header contents in a container with 'pr-12' and 'pt-1'. This isolates the text from the top-right absolute-positioned close (X) button, stopping collision entirely.

Name Wrapping Grace: Applied 'text-2xl sm:text-3xl' fluid sizing, 'leading-[1.15]', 'break-words', and 'line-clamp-3' to the Lead Name. Long names stack elegantly instead of breaking the flex container.
Optical Hierarchy: Extracted the Lead ID and Status Badge into a distinct 'eyebrow' row above the main title. This anchors the top visual edge with high-contrast metadata.
Micro-interactions & De-cluttering: The Service/Course interested line hides its edit icon until hovered/focused (group-hover). This reduces initial cognitive load while retaining discoverability.
Testing Resilience: Injected distinct role-based data-testids into all interactive surfaces and data points.
